success_plan_objectives: Drive platform adoption to 3+ green use cases before renewal window.
Validate measurable value metrics with customer stakeholders.
Close top technical adoption blockers through targeted enablement.
success_plan_metrics: CI adoption percentage across active projects
Security scan coverage in critical repositories
Lead time and deployment frequency trend
success_plan_initiatives: Establish recurring office hours for technical blockers
workshop_prerequisites: Runner access and project permissions validated
renewal_next_steps: Prepare executive readout for renewal checkpoint
Confirm sponsor alignment on realized outcomes
Document mitigation plan for remaining yellow/red signals
templates.issue_default_description: Cross-functional coordination request for pooled CSE on-demand support.
